description: Echt Kö lnisch Wasser by 4711 comes in a flask inspired by a typical vodka bottle which is suitable as it's an alcohol based perfume. Modern day class with vintage styling and references, this perfume has top notes of bergamot, orange, petitgrain and neroli with heart notes of rose and rosemary. The dry down has notes of musk and wood. Quantity: 90 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
